questions.subject: Biology
questions.stem: Which structure is the main site of aerobic respiration in eukaryotic cells?
questions.explanation: Mitochondria carry out the Krebs cycle and oxidative phosphorylation, producing most ATP during aerobic respiration.

questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.stem: For a weak acid HA, which expression represents Ka?
questions.explanation: The acid dissociation constant is Ka = [H+][A-]/[HA].

questions.subject: Physics
questions.stem: A force of 10 N acts on a 2 kg object on a frictionless surface. What is the acceleration?
questions.explanation: Newton's second law gives a = F/m = 10/2 = 5 m/s².
